transcript.text:
[Today's food]
[Mackerel]
[With aged kimchi]
[Crazy visuals]
Did you get a good shot of it?
I can't
What?
I forgot the close-up camera
[She left it at home]
[I'll take care of it]
[Is this right...?]
Will it be okay with a phone camera?
[Well...]
[First time using the phone camera?]
[Zoom in!]
Why're you laughing?

It zooms into your nose
[Please don't]
I don't know how to use it
You forgot your camera
Protect my pores
[Will she be okay this mukbang?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Guri today
I came here after seeing a blog
Apparently, all of the locals know about this restaurant
They have braised mackerel with kimchi and it looks scrumptious
[Braised mackerel with aged kimchi]
You can see its age
Over here
[Uh Rang Chu] [Guri-si, Donggureung-ro]
Did I do braised fish mukbang before?

Hello
Oh Tzuyang!
I'm a subscriber
[Subscriber!]
-So all of the locals know this place? -Really?
What do you mean? Our neighbors don't even know us
It's so secluded that only the regulars come
[Restaurant interior that gives a nostalgic-vibe]
This place has been here for 20 years
It definitely seems like it
It's just braised mackerel on the menu
Just that for the main menu And some sides
Let's order the biggest size 5 servings
Tteokgalbi and Memil pancake sounds good too (Grilled beef patties & buckwheat pancake)
Free rice refills?!
Excuse me

5 servings of braised mackerel,
White rice,
Tteokgalbi, and memil pancake, please
[Worried]
We're not like other restaurants
We literally just serve kimchi and mackerel Is that okay?
I'll take them to-go if I can't finish it
[Confirms order]
[Mouth-watering dish: Spicy Braised Mackerel with Aged Kimchi]
Thank you
[Video quality is not as good...]
Did you get a good shot of it?
I can't
What?
I can't do a close-up because I forgot the camera
[This mukbang will be uploaded on Friday!]

[Let's use this then]
This camera is not as good
[Maybe the person using it is not skilled enough]
That's even a lot of food for 5 people
Really?
Thank you
Tteokgalbi looks good
I came here for the mackerel, but let's start off with tteokgalbi
This looks amazing
I apologize... The close-up on this would've been amazing
Be careful
[Memil Jeonbyung] (Buckwheat pancake)
Look how well this is cooked
Tteokgalbi (grilled beef patty) is so tasty
I want to try this too
All the sides before the main dish

Memil Jeonbyung
[Fail]
That's good
Now for the main
Look at the kimchi
A bite of the kimchi first
[Self-zoom]
That's spicy
There's a lot of kimchi sauce on it
That sourness and the fish taste
Delicious
Mackerel
[Did it right this time]
Some soup
Wrap it like this
I don't eat fish because of the bones

But I don't care today because it's so good
Look how meaty this is
With some soup
So savory
The belly meat
Just be careful of the bones
Some aged kimchi
Get it on white rice
Tail
You can see the bones if you cut this in half
Meat
[Bathe it with some soup]
Take the bones out
Mackerel on top
Such a great combination
Let's eat some soup

Tasty
It's like braised kimchi and braised mackerel
Flavorful
Would be great with some rice
A bite of the memil pancake
[1, 2, 3]
Using the phone camera now
In order to get a close-up shot
Will it be okay?
Wrap it with mackerel
How is it looking?
[You look fine, but not the food]
With some dried seaweed
Get it on top like this
[This might be a little too close...]
Why're you laughing?

[The PD is not used to using the phone camera]
[It's everywhere]
Please protect my pores
[Don't forget the camera next time]
The soup is so good
Dip in soy sauce
This makes it feel like grilled mackerel
[Take the bones out at once]
A bite of this would be incredible
Is it looking good?
-Let me try to zoom in -No no no no
This melts in my mouth
The body
Cut this in half
You can see the big bone here
I wish someone would pick the bones out for me

Kimchi
It's been a while and it's so good
Tteokgalbi
[Kimchi tteokgalbi wrap]
The body is a little harder to eat
But it's oily and tasty
It just has a lot of bones
I did so well picking out the bones
Kimchi and mackerel go so well together
On top
Blanket
That had no bones
Pancake on top
Today is aged kimchi day
[Re-heated]
Seems like you ate half

[I was worried for no reason]
He re-heated it for me
Should I order 1 for to-go?
[Thinking about her family]
Soy sauce
Amazing
It's packed with kimchi
You can eat this for days
This looks scorching hot
[It's okay]
[It's great]
Kimchi got softer
It melts
It has a perfect balance of sweetness and sourness
A very ideal aged kimchi
This can't go wrong

It's spicy
It got spicy
This calls for some rice
A lot more body meat than tail meat
It's starting to get spicy
I'm heated
[Cool it down with some tteokgalbi]
-PD: Is it good? -Yes, delicious
Can I have some?
[I mean... sure...]
[Hungry hand]
It's really good
It's because you left the camera
[On strike]
Good, right?
So good

Spicy, but good It keeps going in
[Tzuyang asking for something]
I'm going to make some mixed rice
It's going to be great
Thank you
Kimchi
[Cut it up...]
Get the mackerel meat ready
[How was my mom so good at picking out fish bones?]
This one right here!
[Looks very meaty]
[Mackerel Bibimbap (mixed rice)]
-It tastes so good, right? -PD: Yeah
I'll get you 1 for to-go
This will be so good with some soju at home
This is it! It's so good

[This combo can't go wrong!]
Tasty It's perfect
Tastes like braised mackerel bibimbap,
But feels like tuna kimchi fried rice
Get some on top
[She's really putting it away]
5 people struggle to finish that
How can a skinny and pretty lady like her eat all of that?
This is the real deal It's so good
Get the rice
This is real So good
I was alone at first, but it suddenly became a full house
I have to bring my mom here
Once she sees this video, she will say: "When will you take me? You're not going to take me"
[All talk]
Will you be okay eating this much?

[How's this possible?]
You're the best Amazing
Thank you
[Scrape it all up]
You're incredible
Where does it all go?
[FInished]
It was so good I had a great meal
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
